explorations_completed.goal_summary: Extract 5 structural features of CKN (1982) proof of partial regularity
explorations_completed.key_finding: Dimension <= 1 forced by scale-invariance of E(r) = (1/r) int|nabla u|^2; Y2 (Ladyzhenskaya absorption) is dominant lossy step

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Extract 5 structural features of Lin (1998) simplified proof and compare with CKN
explorations_completed.key_finding: Lin is a streamlining not a structural departure; C(r) alone gives dim <= 2, dim <= 1 requires E(r) from dissipation

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Extract 5 structural features of Vasseur (2007) De Giorgi proof and compare with CKN
explorations_completed.key_finding: De Giorgi beats CKN on velocity (5/3 > 3/2) but local pressure term gives new obstruction at 4/3; beta = 3/2 is exact threshold for full regularity
